query: Gemini Spark Enterprise preview release date details

mako.raw:
{"query":"Gemini Spark Enterprise preview release date details","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1486,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.mayhemcode.com/2026/05/gemini-spark-google-io-2026-what-it-is.html","title":"Gemini Spark Google IO 2026: What It Is and How It Works","content":"“Google IO 2026 bhai, watch the keynote.” I ignored it.
Google called Gemini Spark a “24/7 personal AI agent.” Not an assistant.
Connect your Gmail, Docs, Calendar, and let Spark keep things moving without you having to babysit it.
For now, Spark connects to Gmail and Google Workspace apps, with third-party support — Canva, OpenTable, Instacart — coming through MCP later this summer.
US Google AI Ultra subscribers get it in beta starting next week, around May 26.
Everyone else, including Google Workspace business users, gets it “soon.” International users: no date yet.
Gemini 3.5 Flash is now powering autocomplete — so instead of just predicting your next word, it’s trying to help you build your actual question as you type.
Spark runs on Gemini 3.5, and there’s a separate model specifically called Gemini 3.5 Flash that Google launched at I/O.
Gemini Spark is an interesting idea that I can’t try yet because it’s US-only and costs more than what most people in India spend on streaming subscriptions combined."},{"url":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/gemini-app/gemini-spark-updates-june-2026/","title":"Gemini Spark updates: macOS launch, connected apps and more","content":"You can now use Gemini Spark on macOS to automate tasks across your desktop files.
Get real-time updates on news, sports, and finance without constantly refreshing your browser.
Gemini Spark for macOS is available in Beta to Google AI Ultra subscribers aged 18 and over, starting in the US.
Download the app at gemini.google/mac to get started.
We’re also launching integrations with Canva, Dropbox, Instacart, OpenTable and Zillow Rentals, so you can easily design custom flyers, access and share your files, reserve a table for date night, order your weekly groceries or reserve an apartment tour.
These connected apps are rolling out over the next week on Gemini Spark on web and mobile and will be rolling out to the macOS app in the coming weeks."},{"url":"https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/01/gemini-spark-googles-agentic-assistant-is-now-available-on-mac/","title":"Gemini Spark, Google's agentic assistant, is now available on Mac | TechCrunch","content":"Gemini Spark, Google’s AI agent that can help with aspects of your digital life, is now available on Mac.
The company on Wednesday said Spark is being added to the existing Gemini desktop app, as well as several updates and new features, including the ability to stay up to date on topics in real time, and connect to more apps like Google Tasks and Google Keep.
Spark now also integrates with other third-party apps, including Canva, Dropbox, Instacart, OpenTable, and Zillow Rentals.
Plus, Google says it’s rolling out support for custom Model Context Protocol (MCP), which will allow you to connect your favorite apps directly into Spark to build an assistant better tailored to your needs."}]}

{"query":"Gemini Spark Enterprise preview release date details","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HUtGAnke4w4","title":"Google Gemini Spark Rollout Schedule: When Do You Get Access?","content":"Google Gemini Spark Rollout Schedule: When Do You Get Access?
Greg Hamburg | AI Media & No-Code
270 subscribers
3 likes
210 views
22 May 2026
Wondering when you finally get access to Google’s new Gemini Spark AI agent? In this video, we break down exactly what Gemini Spark is and give you the official rollout schedule so you know when this 24/7 background assistant hits your account.

Announced at Google I/O, Gemini Spark is an "always-on" agent that can manage your Gmail, organize your calendar, and automate workflows across Google Workspace even when your device is locked or offline. But it isn't dropping for everyone at the exact same time. We look at the rollout phases for Trusted Testers, Google AI Ultra subscribers, and when it’s finally coming to the desktop app this summer.
#GoogleSpark #GeminiSpark #GeminiSparkRelease

Google is launching a personal AI agent that works around the clock on your behalf hero image. Google announced Gemini Spark, a personal AI agent that operates continuously to complete tasks on a user's behalf, at its annual I/O developer conference on Tuesday. The agent is built on Gemini 3.5 Flash, Google's latest model, and runs on Google Cloud infrastructure, meaning users do not need to keep a device active for it to function. Google is rolling out Gemini Spark to trusted testers now, with a wider beta release planned for Google AI Ultra subscribers in the U.S. next week. Gemini is becoming a more helpful AI assistant, with an intuitive new UI, proactive daily briefs and Gemini Spark, an agent to help you get things done around the clock. It’s been a banner year for the Gemini app. In time for Google I/O 2026, here’s what's new:. * **Daily Brief:** A new agent that gives you a personalized morning brief and organizes exactly what you need to know to start your day. * **Gemini Spark:** A 24/7 personal AI agent designed to proactively manage tasks and help you navigate your digital life, all under your direction. * **MacOS app:** Our desktop app will be integrating Gemini Spark so it can operate on your local machine, and it will also add powerful new voice features.
